scenarios.name: S1 — Radar over America (raster control)
scenarios.prompt: Show me radar over America. Just fetch and display NEXRAD radar reflectivity over the continental US. No follow-up questions.

stream_rows.text: Show me radar over America. Just fetch and display NEXRAD radar reflectivity over the continental US. No follow-up questions.
I've added the NEXRAD composite reflectivity layer from the Iowa State Mesonet to the map, showing radar over the continental US.

scenarios.name: S2 — Weather alerts across America (vector polygon)
scenarios.prompt: Show me active NWS weather alerts across America. Display all current alerts as polygons on the map. No follow-up questions.

scenarios.name: S3 — Protected areas in Big Cypress (vector polygon + chain)
scenarios.prompt: Show me protected areas in Big Cypress National Preserve. Geocode the area first then fetch WDPA protected-area polygons within ~50km. No follow-up questions.

stream_rows.text: Show me protected areas in Big Cypress National Preserve. Geocode the area first then fetch WDPA protected-area polygons within ~50km. No follow-up questions.
I have fetched the protected areas for Big Cypress National Preserve, and they are now displayed on the map.

scenarios.name: S4 — Roads near Fort Myers (vector linestring)
scenarios.prompt: Show me roads near Fort Myers, Florida. Geocode Fort Myers then fetch OSM road linestrings within a small bbox around the city center. No follow-up questions.

stream_rows.text: Show me roads near Fort Myers, Florida. Geocode Fort Myers then fetch OSM road linestrings within a small bbox around the city center. No follow-up questions.
I have fetched the OpenStreetMap road layer for Fort Myers, Florida. It is now available for you to view.

scenarios.name: S5 — Recoverable failure → retry (per job-0177)
scenarios.prompt: Fetch protected areas using an obviously-invalid bbox [200, 200, 250, 250] (out of lon/lat range). If the tool fails, retry with a corrected bbox covering Florida (roughly [-87, 24, -80, 31]).

stream_rows.text: Fetch protected areas using an obviously-invalid bbox [200, 200, 250, 250] (out of lon/lat range). If the tool fails, retry with a corrected bbox covering Florida (roughly [-87, 24, -80, 31]).
